code:
--- id: jwks-rotation-state title: "SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle" description: "State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS." updated: 2025-02-14 tags: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --- stateDiagram-v2 [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Provisioning Provisioning --> Current: Activated Current --> Retiring: Key Rotation Initiated Retiring --> Deprecated: Grace Window Expired Deprecated --> Purge: TTL / Manual Cleanup Purge --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] note right of Provisioning: Generate key pair
Store kid + created_at note right of Current: Signs new tokens
JWKS exposes kid note right of Retiring: Valid for verification only
New tokens use CURRENT note right of Deprecated: Should not verify (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) note right of Purge: Row deletion or archive

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个JWKS密钥生命周期状态机，主要给IoT工业场景用。起点是TelemetryStream触发密钥创建，终点是ActuatorController那边清理完成。中间要有Provisioning、Current、Retiring、Deprecated、Purge这几个状态。
明白，起点是TelemetryStream进入Provisioning，终点是Purge到ActuatorController。状态流转方向是单向的吗？比如Provisioning到Current是叫Activated？
对，Provisioning通过Activated事件变成Current。然后Current状态在密钥轮换时触发Key Rotation Initiated，进入Retiring。每个状态我这边还有具体的业务注释要加。
好的，我先画出主流程：Provisioning→Current→Retiring→Deprecated→Purge，两端分别连接TelemetryStream和ActuatorController。现在在Retiring右边加注释：Valid for verification only，New tokens use CURRENT。
Retiring到Deprecated的触发条件是Grace Window Expired，这个 grace period 是我们给旧密钥的缓冲期。然后Deprecated到Purge可以是TTL到期或者手动清理。
收到。Deprecated的注释我写"Should not verify (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)"对吗？还有Provisioning需要注明Generate key pair和Store kid + created_at，Current要说明Signs new tokens和JWKS exposes kid。
没错，Purge的注释是Row deletion or archive。整个图标题用"SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle"，标签打上IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。
完成。状态机从TelemetryStream开始，经过Provisioning生成密钥对，Current状态签发新token，Retiring仅用于验签，Deprecated后TelemetryStream不应再使用该密钥验证，最终Purge清理数据到达ActuatorController。所有注释和标签已添加。
